ticket: Not urgent, but our CFO cannot export invoices before tomorrow's board reporting.
We changed our domain last week and only some admins can still get through SSO.
The API feels flaky after our automation launch, but it is only affecting a few customers so far.
Docs say migration should not change access, but our finance owner lost billing admin immediately after the upgrade and exports are blocked.
I do not have account details yet, but people report random login failures this morning.
